title: Astro read this JSON
blurb: These cards started life as a JSON file. The build process read it, looped over the entries, and stamped each one into the HTML before you arrived.

title: Tailwind compiled to CSS
blurb: The classes on every element got scanned, matched against the Tailwind config, and turned into a small stylesheet. None of that work happens in your browser.

title: Components flattened into HTML
blurb: The source has a Layout, an index page, and these card components. The output is one HTML file with no trace of the composition. The seams disappeared at build time.

title: What you see is what shipped
blurb: Open the page source. The text of this card is right there as a string. Nothing fetched it, nothing rendered it on the fly. It was decided in advance.
